data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Crown And 529 Capital To Co-Build and Co-Own Reverse Osmosis Plant in Mexico
data.description:
Crown Electrokinetics to Build Desalination Plant in Cabo San Lucas for Clean Water Supply
Crown Electrokinetics (NASDAQ: CRKN) and 529 Capital are co-developing a reverse osmosis desalination plant in Cabo San Lucas to provide reliable clean water. The $40 million project will utilize Crown's proprietary slant wells to desalinate seawater, benefiting local resorts and communities. The plant aims to address the region's water shortage while generating recurring annual revenue for Crown Electrokinetics.
